title: Personal Portfolio Website
description: A responsive personal website built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript featuring dynamic navigation, dark mode, JSON-rendered projects, and GitHub profile stats.

title: SoCalGuessr City Classifier
description: A deep learning project that classifies Southern California Street View images into six cities using a MobileNetV3-Small model, transfer learning, and multi-view test-time augmentation.

title: Smart Food Tracker (Nutribase)
description: A full-stack React and MongoDB web app connected to ESP32 hardware for shared-fridge food tracking, real-time item management, and weight syncing.

title: Image & Audio Processing App
description: An object-oriented Python application using NumPy and PIL for RGB image editing, WAV audio processing, and a KNN image classifier.

title: Clash Royale Win Rate Analysis
description: A data science project analyzing how deck elixir cost influences win rate among the top 1000 Clash Royale players, using data cleaning, visualization, and predictive modeling.

title: Course Grades Analysis Toolkit
description: A Python and pandas project that analyzes course grade data by computing assignment totals, lateness penalties, redemption effects, section rankings, and a letter-grade heat map.

title: Loan and Tax Data Analysis
description: A Python, pandas, and Plotly project that analyzes loan data, studies interest rates and missingness patterns, cleans state tax brackets, and estimates borrowers’ disposable income.

title: Language Modeling with N-Grams
description: A Python and pandas project that downloads and tokenizes Project Gutenberg books, then builds uniform, unigram, and N-gram language models for text probability and sampling.

title: Early Game Advantage in Professional League of Legends
description: A data science project on how early-game stats relate to pro League of Legends match outcomes.

title: Song Recommender System
description: A Python recommendation engine built with Pandas and scikit-learn using collaborative filtering on a large user-song dataset.

title: Word Search Solver in C
description: A C program that solves word-search puzzles using recursive 8-direction search and prints the word path.

title: Tic-Tac-Toe AI in C++
description: A C++ Tic-Tac-Toe game with player-vs-player, player-vs-AI, and a game tree–based minimax strategy.

title: Bikewatching
description: An interactive Mapbox visualization of Boston-area bike lanes, BlueBike stations, and traffic patterns by time of day.
